hotels.name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel Atlanta- Alpharetta

safety_tips.tip: Tipping people, especially at restaurants, is a norm. Restaurant waiters expect 18%-25% of total bill as tips. Also customary to add 10%-15% tips for taxi rides

emergency_contacts.notes: One number for any emergencies including medical emergencies and ambulance. Accessible from anywhere, even where there doesn't appear to be any cell signal
5549 Glenridge Dr, Sandy Springs, GA 30342. Nearest consulate for Florida

connectivity_tips.tip: Buy a sim card from TSIM. They offer both physical and eSIMs. If getting two sims, recommend getting a T-mobile one and an AT&T one

health_tips.tip: Travel insurance recommended with $100,000 coverage for each family member. Tata AIG has a plan for Rs. 8370 with $100 deductible. visitorscoverage.com has a Patriot America Plus plan with zero deductible at $200
Most places in the US are pretty dry and it is easy to get sunburnt, so carry and apply sunscreen (SPF 30) when out in the Sun
